title: GEEPAS 25W Citrus Juicer for Quick, Healthy, Nutritious Juices | Effortless Juicer with Bi-Direction Twist | Copper Motor, 1 Litre Capacity - 2 Year Warranty
features: ✅ EASY TO USE FOR EFFORTLESS JUICE EXTRACTION - Simply cut the orange in half, place one piece gently onto the cone, and the automatic citrus press will begin rotating in both directions for maximum juice extraction. No buttons, no hassle—just freshly squeezed juice in seconds. Ideal for oranges, lemons, limes, and other citrus fruits.
✅ LEMON SQUEEZER FOR ORANGES & GRAPEFRUITS – This electric lemon squeezer features a universal cone ideal for medium to large fruits. Get effortless juicing with no swapping, no mess, and no waste.

✅ BI-DIRECTION TWIST WITH FILTER - The juicer can twist in both directions. This increases the extraction efficiency with ease and also speeds up the work. Filtered design to separate the pulp from the juice for a smooth taste. Ideal for daily use and consistent performance.

✅ HANDS-FREE AUTO START DESIGN-The lemon juicer turns on automatically when pressed—no switches to deal with. It’s safe, simple, and perfect for the entire family. Enjoy effortless citrus squeezing anytime.
✅ FRESH LIME JUICE IN A FLASH-This lime squeezer works fast with a powerful 25W copper motor. Quiet and efficient, it delivers high juice yield for cocktails, cooking, or a quick health shot at home.
description: Product Description SMOOTH JUICE EVERYTIME This simple machine makes delicious juices while maintaining the natural flavour and preserving the nutrients. POWERFUL MOTOR 25W Copper Motor ensures effortless extraction with maximum flavour for rich, smooth, and aromatic results every time. BI-DIRECTION TWIST Smart juicer with dual-direction twist spins to reduce pulp waste and maximize juice yield for fresh, efficient squeezing. EASY TO CLEAN Detachable parts for easy cleaning and hassle-free maintenance — keeps your appliance spotless every time. 1L LARGE CAPACITY 1L juice container with clear measurement markings for easy pouring and perfect juice preparation every time. TRANSPERANT JUICE RESERVOIR Transparent design for easy content monitoring—keep track effortlessly with clear, visible storage. BUILT-IN PULP FILTER Electric citrus juicer with fixed pulp filter separates seeds and excess pulp for smooth, fresh juice every time. ANTI SLIP FEET Provides stability and safety by preventing objects from slipping or shifting on smooth surfaces effectively.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Bi-Direction Twist, Easy to Clean, Lightweight, Portable
